name: ConnectionPoint
summary: This is the interface to a LayOut Connection Point. A ConnectionPoint defines a target point to which a Label or LinearDimension can connect.

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::ConnectionPoint.
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::ConnectionPoint.

params.name: point
params.doc: The position on the entity to connect to.

params.name: aperture
params.doc: The search radius to find the entity provided. If no aperture value is provided, a default value of 0.0001 will be used. The value provided must be greater than zero.

throws.when: if point passed in is not within the bounds of entity
if aperture is not greater than zero
if entity is not in a document
